description: A modern To-Do productivity app with dashboard stats, category filtering, priority levels, and reactive task management — built with MVUX, SimpleTheme, and region-based TabBar navigation.

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready modern To-Do / Task Manager mobile app with:
- mock state
- SafeArea root + AutoLayout/Flex only (no absolute positioning)
- SOLID components (Dashboard, TaskList, CategoryCards, CompletedHistory)
- clean productivity UI (indigo/blue tones, crisp cards, clear typography)

Dashboard screen:
- stats cards (total tasks, completed, pending, high priority count)
- high priority tasks list with check-off
- "View All Tasks" CTA

Tasks screen:
- add new task (title + notes)
- category filter chips (All, Work, Personal, Shopping, Health)
- task list with priority dots, category icons, toggle complete, delete

Categories screen:
- category cards showing pending/completed counts

Completed screen:
- completed tasks with undo and clear all

Navigation:
- bottom nav (Dashboard, Tasks, Categories, Completed)

Include:
- full working code
- navigation
- mock state with 10 seeded tasks
- priority levels (High, Medium, Low) with color indicators
- reactive push-based updates
Here's your **TaskFlow** app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add a new page with navigation

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready modern To-Do / Task Manager mobile app with:
- mock state
- SafeArea root + AutoLayout/Flex only (no absolute positioning)
- SOLID components (Dashboard, TaskList, CategoryCards, CompletedHistory)
- clean productivity UI (indigo/blue tones, crisp cards, clear typography)

Dashboard screen:
- stats cards (total tasks, completed, pending, high priority count)
- high priority tasks list with check-off

- priority levels (High, Medium, Low) with color indicators
- reactive push-based updates

I've created a complete Uno Platform app at app/TaskFlow/TaskFlow.csproj.

**Key files:**
